summary: Card created from download-system investigation (4-agent sweep); large plan attached.
Large adaptive plan attached (plan.md): 8 phases + 1 parallel batch, Socratic Gate G1-G20 resolved with user, research dossiers 00-04 preserved.
todo → doing: starting Phase 1 (pure core installStore + computeProgress + tests).

Phase 1 shipped (0d4f0301): installStore + computeProgress + 34 tests green. Handoff phase2-carve.md written with verified carve anchors; Phase 2 deferred (budget) — recommended 2a cure-in-place + 2b file split.

Phase 2a shipped (5bbf08f2): refCount DELETED (field+bumps+decrements+rollbacks+serialization+engine.js), totalBytes +=->SET both engines (G12), register-before-respond (G8) via _serializeModelJob. Store instantiation deferred to 2b (avoid two live SOTs). Verify green: grep refCount->comments only, node-install-batch-resilience+node-drift+install-store(23)+install-progress(11), eslint clean, GET /downloads/status->{success,jobs:[]}.

Phase 2b.1 shipped (0ae5fa07): ResumableDownloader->FileDownloader rename (class + 6 uses + engine.js:17/:139 + shared.js + test). Pure rename, zero behavior change. Verify: eslint clean, install-store(23)+install-progress(11) green, modules require cleanly with FileDownloader exported. Safe-slice-first (user call): G9 version + store-as-SOT swap + physical adapter split remain 2b.3/2b.4. Pre-existing download-completion resumeFromFile failure noted (dead on cae5e6bd too).

Phase 2b.3 shipped (749ce170 + 3e4fa02b): installStore wired as verified SHADOW SOT. _registerModelInStore at 3 start sites; all 31 status writes -> _setModelStatus/_setDepStatus helpers driving store transitions (map->store string map, model complete->done, idle map-only); cancelAll -> store.clear(); G9 store.version() added additively to status + start responses. Maps stay write-authoritative + transport carriers. KEY: read-flip + map-status-write deletion BLOCKED on Phase 4 FE mirror (serialize emits runtime strings/shape, no FE consumes store snapshot yet) -> moved into P4. P3 reconciler independent. Verify: zero raw .status= writes, load+lint clean, install-store(23)+install-progress(11)+node-install-batch-resilience+node-drift+node-install-progress green.

Phase 3 shipped (NOT committed): routes/install/reconciler.js (G11) + wired into downloadManager.js. createReconciler pure/injected; reconcileOnce settles wedged deps (all-bytes-in missed-terminal MPI-254/255 OR truth installed:true) via legal store transitions, rolls model->done on all non-node deps complete (holds if custom_node pending), fails orphans (no progress+no disk+60s grace), pruneTerminal+broadcastSnapshot; 15s poll gated on hasActiveJobs, reentrancy-guarded, unref. _reconcilerCheckInstalled routes local->localModelsCheck remote->remoteModelsCheck. Wired: start() from _registerModelInStore, SSE-connect reconcile+snapshot (cold-boot phantom killer), post-uninstall pass, cancelAll->stop. registeredAt/lastTickAt stamped on store job refs (zero store-API change). Existing remote stall-watchdog LEFT IN (drives maps; retires at P4 write-flip). Verify: install-reconciler(12)+install-store(23)+install-progress(11)+node-install-batch-resilience(4)+node-drift(23), load+eslint clean, grep refCount->comments only.

summary.summary: Phase 4 COMPLETE (4a-4d, sequential not parallel - shared downloadManager.js broke disjoint ownership; NOT committed). 4a: downloadService consumes download:snapshot (version-gated wholesale replace, store done->complete, delta detail carried forward); DELETED MPI-241 merge heuristic + orphanedActive + _recentlyCancelled (G8 register-before-respond kills the race). 4b: pending UX G2 (optimistic pending job, Starting label, _armPendingRevert 10s->drop+ui:warning toast, _firePost consumes response job snapshot). 4c: store.syncProgress + _syncStoreProgress at 3 tick sites (snapshot was 0%-progress -> would break 4a); pull endpoints kept map-backed (deleting map status = 15-site reader sweep, deferred w/ G6 adapters). 4d satisfied by 4b busy-set. model-footer-settling rewritten to snapshot-apply contract (11), install-store 25 (+syncProgress), all suites green, lint clean. REMAINING full read-flip deferred (mirror-delete map writes, retire stall-watchdog). Next: Phase 5 uninstall unification.

Phase 5 SHIPPED - uninstall unification (G13) in routes/downloadManager.js + new tests/uninstall-guards.test.cjs (10). NOT committed. Bug1: server-side engine filter (_filterDepsForEngine on entry, was trusting wire verbatim). Bug2: in-flight protection both engines via store (_inFlightDepIds = non-terminal model jobs excluding self; local flipped OFF legacy _depJobs map ONTO store, remote had NONE now unions it). Bug3: custom-node FOLDER delete (_customNodeUninstallPath = custom_nodes/<filename>/ not the long-gone zip) + honest removed[] (only push when existed, else keptModelFiles already-absent). G4 preserved verbatim (universal/pip keep, whole-model shared guard, trash->fs.remove, path-outside refusals, post-uninstall reconcile). Verify green: uninstall-guards 10 + install-store 25 + install-reconciler 12 + install-progress 11 + node-install-batch 4 + node-drift 23; require clean; eslint clean; grep refCount routes -> doc comments only. Next: Phase 6 Pod wrapper (separate repo).

Phase 6 (code) SHIPPED - Pod wrapper 0.2.36->0.2.37 (separate repo mpi-ci, NOT committed) + app routes/remoteModels.js (uncommitted). (a) hot-store evict on delete: new _hot_evict_key removes NVMe disk copy + _hot_state + persist, /wrapper/models/delete calls it under _hot_lock after volume delete (was leaking staged copy + re-install read stale hot copy). New wrapper/test_hot_store_evict.py 4 asserts. (b) pipPins parity: _install_node_requirements runs pip install <pins> AFTER requirements (both command+reqs.txt paths), threaded via rec pip_pins from body at both install sites; remoteModels.js sends body.pip_pins=dep.pipPins. WRAPPER_VERSION 0.2.37. Verify: py_compile OK, evict test passes, remoteModels loads, grep delete->evict + 0.2.37. PENDING 6b: publish-runtime.sh stable (R2 push - USER APPROVAL) + Pod restart, then git -C mpi-ci commit. Next: Phase 7 docs.
